command.name: northflank
command.description: Manage your Northflank resources from the command line

options.description: Print the current version of the Northflank cli

subcommands.name: forward
subcommands.description: Port-forwarding for Northflank services and addons

subcommands.name: all
subcommands.description: Port-forwarding for all services and addons in the given project

options.description: Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Only expose on IP address, not on hostnames. With this option, no root permissions are required

subcommands.name: service
subcommands.description: Port-forwarding for the specified service

options.description: Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Only expose on IP address, not on hostnames. With this option, no root permissions are required

subcommands.name: addon
subcommands.description: Port-forwarding for the specified addon

options.description: Only expose on IP address, not on hostnames. With this option, no root permissions are required

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: command-exec
subcommands.description: Command execution (exec) for Northflank services and jobs

subcommands.name: service
subcommands.description: Command exec for the specified service

options.description: Container to exec into (random container will be chosen if not specified)
Run command with shell (e.g. bash,sh). If not set and no command is provided, several standard shells will be attempted. If not set and a command is provided, t
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Command to execute, if --shell option is present, it will run in the specified shell, otherwise

subcommands.name: job
subcommands.description: Command exec for the specified job

options.description: Container to exec into (random container will be chosen if not specified)
Run command with shell (e.g. bash,sh). If not set and no command is provided, several standard shells will be attempted. If not set and a command is provided, t
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Command to execute, if --shell option is present, it will run in the specified shell, otherwise

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help for command

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: Connect the CLI to your Northflank account

options.description: Use manual login with API token
Use browser login but only print URL which can be used to login
Token for this context. When set, browser login is not used
Override existing contexts (this will remove project and service context)

subcommands.name: context
subcommands.description: Retrieve and update local context settings

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: List all available contexts

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Switch between your local contexts

options.description: Change current context to context identified by this name

subcommands.name: project
subcommands.description: Change the default project in the current local context

options.description: Project name (internal id) to use as default in context

subcommands.name: job
subcommands.description: Change the default job in the current local context

options.description: Job name (internal id) to use as default in context

subcommands.name: service
subcommands.description: Change the default service in the current local context

options.description: Service name (internal id) to use as default in context

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: Get log for the specified addon

options.description: Container to exec into (logs from all containers will be shown if not specified)
Tail will stream logs in real-time. Session will be kept open
Get logs generated after this time, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Get logs generated before this time, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Length of timespan in seconds. Only valid if not both, startTime and endTime are set
Direction of logs. Ignored when tailing
Filter log lines to include this text
Filter log lines to not include this text
Filter log lines to match this regular expression
Filter log lines to not match this regular expression
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Output formatting. Will use advanced formatting by default

subcommands.name: metrics
subcommands.description: Get metrics for the specified addon

options.description: Container to exec into (logs from all containers will be shown if not specified)
Get metrics after this timestamp, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Get metrics before this timestamp, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Length of timespan in seconds. Only valid if not both, startTime and endTime are set
Get metrics at this exact timestamp, if no timestamp set most recent time is used. example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Output formatting. Will use advanced formatting by default

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: Get log for the specified service

options.description: Container to exec into (logs from all containers will be shown if not specified)
Tail will stream logs in real-time. Session will be kept open
Get logs generated after this time, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Get logs generated before this time, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Length of timespan in seconds. Only valid if not both, startTime and endTime are set
Direction of logs. Ignored when tailing
Filter log lines to include this text
Filter log lines to not include this text
Filter log lines to match this regular expression
Filter log lines to not match this regular expression
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Output formatting. Will use advanced formatting by default

subcommands.name: metrics
subcommands.description: Get metrics for the specified service

options.description: Container to exec into (logs from all containers will be shown if not specified)
Get metrics after this timestamp, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Get metrics before this timestamp, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Length of timespan in seconds. Only valid if not both, startTime and endTime are set
Get metrics at this exact timestamp, if no timestamp set most recent time is used. example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Output formatting. Will use advanced formatting by default

Length of timespan in seconds. Only valid if not both, startTime and endTime are set
Direction of logs. Ignored when tailing
Filter log lines to include this text
Filter log lines to not include this text
Filter log lines to match this regular expression
Filter log lines to not match this regular expression
Don't use context default values, explicitly use options or ask
Output formatting. Will use advanced formatting by default

options.description: Container to exec into (logs from all containers will be shown if not specified)

Get metrics before this timestamp, example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
Length of timespan in seconds. Only valid if not both, startTime and endTime are set
Get metrics at this exact timestamp, if no timestamp set most recent time is used. example: 2020-02-02T02:02:02Z (date string) or 1580608922 (unix ts)
